summary: Iteration 13: Complete testing of local/offline mode features and existing online functionality. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including new connection mode indicator showing 'ONLINE (VPS)'.
passed_tests: Backend: API root returns version 2.0.0
Backend: Admin login successful with admin/admin123
Backend: Casier login successful with casier/casier123
Backend: Invalid login correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/products returns products list
Backend: GET /api/categories returns categories
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns suppliers
Backend: GET /api/daily/opening-summary returns dashboard data
Backend: GET /api/stock/dashboard returns stock info
Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts returns alerts list
Backend: GET /api/reports/sales returns sales report
Backend: GET /api/sales returns sales history
Backend: GET /api/nir returns NIR list
Backend: GET /api/held-orders returns held orders
Backend: GET /api/fiscal/bridge-status returns bridge status
Backend: GET /api/settings/tva returns TVA settings with 21% default
Backend: GET /api/bridge/download returns valid zip file
Backend: Bridge zip contains local_setup scripts (install_andrepau.bat, start_andrepau.bat, stop_andrepau.bat, update_local.bat, README_INSTALARE.txt)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns current user info
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Admin login redirects to Start Day page
Frontend: Casier login works correctly
Frontend: Connection mode indicator shows 'ONLINE (VPS)' in sidebar
Frontend: Navigation to POS page works
Frontend: Navigation to Products page works
Frontend: Navigation to Stock page works
Frontend: Navigation to Reports page works
Frontend: Theme toggle switches between light and dark modes
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page
Frontend: Casier sees limited navigation (no admin-only pages)
critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic API URL detection in AuthContext.js and App.js correctly identifies VPS vs localhost
Connection mode indicator in Layout.js correctly shows 'ONLINE (VPS)' for non-localhost access
Bridge download endpoint includes all local_setup scripts for offline deployment
Static file serving in server.py is conditional on build directory existence (won't affect VPS mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified all local/offline mode features work correctly in online VPS mode. Key features tested: (1) Dynamic API URL detection - correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for VPS access. (2) Connection mode indicator - shows 'ONLINE (VPS)' in green in sidebar when accessed via VPS URL. (3) Bridge download - includes local_setup scripts (install_andrepau.bat, start_andrepau.bat, stop_andrepau.bat, update_local.bat, README_INSTALARE.txt). (4) Static file serving - conditional in server.py, only activates when frontend/build exists. All existing functionality continues to work: login, navigation, theme toggle, logout, all API endpoints.

dynamic_api_url.description: AuthContext.js and App.js correctly detect hostname and use appropriate API URL

connection_mode_indicator.description: Shows 'ONLINE (VPS)' in green when accessed via VPS URL

static_file_serving.description: Conditional static file serving in server.py - only activates when frontend/build exists
